pi_items.source: README.md task description and setup_task.sh PHP script that creates the course with shortname='MATH201'
README.md Question Bank — Probability Basics table lists 3 multiple-choice questions (Q1, Q2, Q3)
README.md explicitly states '3 Multiple Choice Questions' under Probability Basics section
README.md Question Bank — Descriptive Statistics table lists 2 true/false questions (Q4, Q5)
README.md explicitly states '2 True/False Questions' under Descriptive Statistics section
README.md Quiz section and task description both specify exact name 'MATH201 Mid-Term Examination'
README.md Quiz table specifies 'Time limit: 45 minutes'; verifier.py line 112 confirms 45 min = 2700 seconds
README.md Quiz table specifies 'Maximum attempts: 1'; verifier.py expects attempts == 1
README.md Quiz table specifies 'Grade to pass: 60 out of 100'
README.md Step 11 and Quiz table specify '2 random from Probability Basics'
README.md Step 12 and Quiz table specify '2 random from Descriptive Statistics'

privileged_info_summary: The task build_question_bank_and_quiz@1 is a synthetic task for Moodle 4.5 LMS. It requires the agent to populate a course MATH201 with a question bank containing two categories: Probability Basics (3 multichoice questions) and Descriptive Statistics (2 truefalse questions). The agent must then create a quiz named MATH201 Mid-Term Examination with a 45-minute time limit, maximum 1 attempt, grade-to-pass of 60 points, and 4 random question slots (2 drawn from each category). All metadata values are specifications for task completion and have been verified against the task description in README.md.
